controls.control_objective: To ensure be examined for authenticity through machines
controls.control_description: 2.1 Banknotes tendered over the counter shall be examined for authenticity through machines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be examined for authenticity through machines

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be examined through machines
controls.control_description: Similarly, banknotes received directly at the back office / currency chest through bulk tenders shall also be examined through machines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be examined through machines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be returned to the tenderer or destroyed by the bank branches
controls.control_description: 2.3 In no case, the Counterfeit Notes shall be returned to the tenderer or destroyed by the bank branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be returned to the tenderer or destroyed by the bank branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be stamped as "counterfeit note" and impounded in the prescribed format (annex i)
controls.control_description:
Impounding of Counterfeit Notes
Notes determined as counterfeit shall be stamped as "COUNTERFEIT NOTE" and impounded in the prescribed format (Annex I).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be stamped as "counterfeit note" and impounded in the prescribed format (annex i)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded under authentication, in a separate register
controls.control_description: Each such impounded note shall be recorded under authentication, in a separate register.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded under authentication, in a separate register

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to the tenderer, after stamping the note as in paragraph 3 ibid
controls.control_description: When a banknote tendered at the counter of a bank branch / back office and currency chest is found to be counterfeit, an acknowledgement receipt in the prescribed format (Annex II) must be issued to the tenderer, after stamping the note as in paragraph 3 ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to the tenderer, after stamping the note as in paragraph 3 ibid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be authenticated by the cashier and tenderer
controls.control_description: The receipt, in running serial number, shall be authenticated by the cashier and tenderer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be authenticated by the cashier and tenderer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed prominently at the offices / branches for information of the public
controls.control_description: Notice to this effect shall be displayed prominently at the offices / branches for information of the public.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed prominently at the offices / branches for information of the public

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed while reporting incidence of detection of counterfeit notes to the police:
controls.control_description: The following procedure shall be followed while reporting incidence of detection of Counterfeit Notes to the Police:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed while reporting incidence of detection of counterfeit notes to the police:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent by the nodal bank officer to the police authorities or the nodal police station, along with the suspect counterfeit notes, at the end of the m
controls.control_description: 5.1 For cases of detection of Counterfeit Notes up to four (04) pieces in a single transaction, a consolidated report in the prescribed format (Annex III) shall be sent by the Nodal Bank Officer to the police authorities or the Nodal Police Station, along with the suspect Counterfeit Notes, at the end of the month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent by the nodal bank officer to the police authorities or the nodal police station, along with the suspect counterfeit notes, at the end of the m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded immediately by the nodal bank officer to the local police authorities or the nodal police station for investigation by filing fir in the
controls.control_description: 5.2 For cases of detection of Counterfeit Notes of five (05) or more pieces in a single transaction, the Counterfeit Notes shall be forwarded immediately by the Nodal Bank Officer to the local police authorities or the Nodal Police Station for investigation by filing FIR in the prescribed format (Annex IV).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded immediately by the nodal bank officer to the local police authorities or the nodal police station for investigation by filing fir in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the forged note vigilance (fnv) cell constituted at the head office of the bank
controls.control_description: 5.3 A copy of the monthly consolidated report / FIR shall be sent to the Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell constituted at the Head Office of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the forged note vigilance (fnv) cell constituted at the head office of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be invariably obtained and kept on record
controls.control_description: If the Counterfeit Notes are sent to the police by insured post, acknowledgement of receipt thereof by the police shall be invariably obtained and kept on record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be invariably obtained and kept on record

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sorted out in consultation with the nodal officer of the police authority designated to coordinate on matters relating to investigation of counterf
controls.control_description: In case any difficulty is faced by the banks due to reluctance of the police to receive monthly consolidated statement / file FIRs, the matter may be sorted out in consultation with the Nodal Officer of the police authority designated to coordinate on matters relating to investigation of Counterfeit Note cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sorted out in consultation with the nodal officer of the police authority designated to coordinate on matters relating to investigation of counterf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from the concerned issue office of rbi
controls.control_description: The list of Nodal Police Stations may be obtained from the concerned Issue Office of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from the concerned issue office of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also monitor the patterns / trends of such detection and suspicious trends / patterns and bring to the notice of rbi / police authorities immediately
controls.control_description: 5.6 Banks shall also monitor the patterns / trends of such detection and suspicious trends / patterns and bring to the notice of RBI / police authorities immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also monitor the patterns / trends of such detection and suspicious trends / patterns and bring to the notice of rbi / police authorities immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be discussed regularly in the meetings of various state level committees viz
controls.control_description: and problems therein, shall be discussed regularly in the meetings of various State Level Committees viz., State Level Bankers' Committee (SLBC), Standing Committee on Currency Management (SCCM), State Level Security Committee (SLSC), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be discussed regularly in the meetings of various state level committees viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in the monthly returns forwarded to the concerned issue office of rbi as indicated in para 10 below
controls.control_description: 5.8 The data on detection of Counterfeit Notes by banks shall be included in the monthly returns forwarded to the concerned Issue Office of RBI as indicated in para 10 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in the monthly returns forwarded to the concerned issue office of rbi as indicated in para 10 below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be <image>
controls.control_description:
In case of suspected foreign currency note received for opinion from the police and government agencies, etc., they shall be
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure re-align their cash management in such a manner so as to ensure that banknotes in the denominations of ₹100 and above are not put into re-circulation
controls.control_description: 6.1 The banks shall re-align their cash management in such a manner so as to ensure that banknotes in the denominations of ₹100 and above are not put into re-circulation without the notes being machine processed for authenticity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to re-align their cash management in such a manner so as to ensure that banknotes in the denominations of ₹100 and above are not put into re-circulation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all bank branches, irrespective of the volume of daily cash receipt
controls.control_description: The said instructions shall be applicable to all bank branches, irrespective of the volume of daily cash receipt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all bank branches, irrespective of the volume of daily cash receipt

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to white level atm operators in terms of circular dpss
controls.control_description: This shall also be applicable to White Level ATM Operators in terms of circular DPSS.CO.OD.No.1916/06.07.011/2018-19 dated March 7, 2019.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to white level atm operators in terms of circular dpss

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract special investigation by police authorities, and other action like suspending the operation of the chest concerned
controls.control_description: 6.3 Detection of Counterfeit Notes in chest remittances is also liable to be construed as wilful involvement of the chest branches concerned in circulating Counterfeit Notes and may attract special investigation by police authorities, and other action like suspending the operation of the chest concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract special investigation by police authorities, and other action like suspending the operation of the chest concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure designate a nodal bank officer, district-wise to serve as the contact point for all counterfeit note detection related activities and notify the same
controls.control_description: Each bank shall designate a Nodal Bank Officer, district-wise to serve as the contact point for all Counterfeit Note detection related activities and notify the same to the concerned Issue Office of the RBI and police authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to designate a nodal bank officer, district-wise to serve as the contact point for all counterfeit note detection related activities and notify the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done through the nodal bank officer
controls.control_description: All cases of reporting of Counterfeit Note detection as indicated in Para 5 shall be done through the Nodal Bank Officer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done through the nodal bank officer

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish at its head office, a forged note vigilance (fnv) cell to undertake the following functions:
controls.control_description: 8.1 Each bank shall establish at its Head Office, a Forged Note Vigilance (FNV) Cell to undertake the following functions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish at its head office, a forged note vigilance (fnv) cell to undertake the following functions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a status report on a half-yearly basis (as at the end of march and september every year), as per the format prescribed in annex vii, by e- mail
controls.control_description: 8.2 FNV Cell shall submit a status report on a half-yearly basis (as at the end of March and September every year), as per the format prescribed in Annex VII, by e- mail, to the Chief General Manager, Department of Currency Management, RBI, Central Office, Amar Building, Fourth Floor, Sir P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a status report on a half-yearly basis (as at the end of march and september every year), as per the format prescribed in annex vii, by e- mail

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish by e-mail, in the prescribed format (annex v), the particulars to the chief general manager, department of currency management, reserve bank o
controls.control_description: 8.3 In order to update the record of the addresses of the FNV Cells, the bank shall furnish by e-mail, in the prescribed format (Annex V), the particulars to the Chief General Manager, Department of Currency Management, Reserve Bank of India and to the concerned Issue office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional, by 15th of April, every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish by e-mail, in the prescribed format (annex v), the particulars to the chief general manager, department of currency management, reserve bank o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be equipped with ultra-violet lamps / other appropriate banknote sorting / detection machines
controls.control_description: 9.1 With a view to facilitate the detection of Counterfeit Notes, all bank branches / identified back offices shall be equipped with ultra-violet lamps / other appropriate banknote sorting / detection machines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be equipped with ultra-violet lamps / other appropriate banknote sorting / detection machines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be equipped with verification, processing and sorting machines and shall be used to their optimum capacity
controls.control_description: In addition, all currency chest branches shall be equipped with verification, processing and sorting machines and shall be used to their optimum capacity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be equipped with verification, processing and sorting machines and shall be used to their optimum capacity

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to the guidelines on 'note authentication and fitness sorting parameters' prescribed by the rbi from time to time
controls.control_description: Such machines shall conform to the guidelines on 'Note Authentication and Fitness Sorting Parameters' prescribed by the RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to conform to the guidelines on 'note authentication and fitness sorting parameters' prescribed by the rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a daily record of the notes processed through the note sorting machines, including the number of counterfeits detected
controls.control_description: 9.2 The banks shall maintain a daily record of the notes processed through the Note Sorting machines, including the number of counterfeits detected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a daily record of the notes processed through the note sorting machines, including the number of counterfeits detected

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider providing at least one counting machine (with dual display facility) for public use at the counter
controls.control_description: 9.3 The banks shall also consider providing at least one counting machine (with dual display facility) for public use at the counter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also consider providing at least one counting machine (with dual display facility) for public use at the counter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compiled and reported by fnv cell of the concerned bank to the issue office of rbi under whose jurisdiction the fnv cell is functional
controls.control_description: Data on Counterfeit Notes detected by all branches and currency chests of the bank shall be compiled and reported by FNV Cell of the concerned bank to the Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compiled and reported by fnv cell of the concerned bank to the issue office of rbi under whose jurisdiction the fnv cell is functional

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in the format (annex vi) on monthly basis, by 7th of the following month
controls.control_description: The reporting shall be made in the format (Annex VI) on monthly basis, by 7th of the following month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in the format (annex vi) on monthly basis, by 7th of the following month

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent
controls.control_description: In case, no counterfeit note has been detected during the month, a "Nil" report shall be sent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent

controls.control_objective: To ensure report information on cash transactions where counterfeit notes have been detected to fiu-ind, by the 15th day of the succeeding month, by uploading t
controls.control_description: 10.2 Under Rule 8 (1) of Prevention of Money Laundering (Maintenance of Records) Amendment Rules, 2013, Principal Officers of banks shall report information on cash transactions where Counterfeit Notes have been detected to FIU-IND, by the 15th day of the succeeding month, by uploading the information on the FINnet Portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report information on cash transactions where counterfeit notes have been detected to fiu-ind, by the 15th day of the succeeding month, by uploading t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uploaded on the web-enabled software of ncrb, new delhi on their website
controls.control_description: Similarly, data on Counterfeit Notes detection shall be uploaded on the web-enabled software of NCRB, New Delhi on their website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be uploaded on the web-enabled software of ncrb, new delhi on their website

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carefully preserved in the safe custody of the bank and a record thereof be maintained by the branch / cc concerned
controls.control_description: 11.1 Counterfeit Notes received back from the police authorities / courts shall be carefully preserved in the safe custody of the bank and a record thereof be maintained by the branch / CC concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carefully preserved in the safe custody of the bank and a record thereof be maintained by the branch / cc concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure also maintain a branch / cc- wise consolidated record of such counterfeit notes
controls.control_description: FNV Cell of the bank shall also maintain a branch / CC- wise consolidated record of such Counterfeit Notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also maintain a branch / cc- wise consolidated record of such counterfeit notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subjected to verification on a half-yearly basis (on 31st march and 30th september) by the officer-in-charge of the bank concerned
controls.control_description: 11.2 These Counterfeit Notes at branches / CCs shall be subjected to verification on a half-yearly basis (on 31st March and 30th September) by the Officer-in-Charge of the bank concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subjected to verification on a half-yearly basis (on 31st march and 30th september) by the officer-in-charge of the bank concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved for a period of three years from the date of receipt from the police authorities
controls.control_description: They shall be preserved for a period of three years from the date of receipt from the police authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved for a period of three years from the date of receipt from the police authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be preserved with the branch / cc concerned for three years after conclusion of the court case
controls.control_description: 11.3 Counterfeit Notes, which are subject matter of litigation in the court of law shall be preserved with the branch / CC concerned for three years after conclusion of the court case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be preserved with the branch / cc concerned for three years after conclusion of the court case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the concerned issue office of rbi under whose jurisdiction the branch / cc is functioning, with full details of the case
controls.control_description: 11.4 After the preservation period, such notes shall be sent to the concerned Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the branch / CC is functioning, with full details of the case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the concerned issue office of rbi under whose jurisdiction the branch / cc is functioning, with full details of the case

controls.control_objective: To ensure also organise / conduct training programmes on the security features of genuine indian banknotes for all bank personnel handling cash to enable detect
controls.control_description: 12.3 The controlling offices / training centres shall also organise / conduct training programmes on the security features of genuine Indian banknotes for all bank personnel handling cash to enable detection of Counterfeit Notes at the point of receipt itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also organise / conduct training programmes on the security features of genuine indian banknotes for all bank personnel handling cash to enable detect

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover detection, impounding and reporting of counterfeit notes
controls.control_description: These trainings shall cover detection, impounding and reporting of Counterfeit Notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover detection, impounding and reporting of counterfeit notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be branded with a stamp "counterfeit
controls.control_description: determined as a counterfeit one, shall be branded with a stamp "COUNTERFEIT
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be branded with a stamp "counterfeit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used
controls.control_description: following inscription may be used.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used

controls.control_objective: To ensure first arrange to send the notes to any of the note printing presses, forensic science laboratories, etc
controls.control_description: In case, it is decided to file criminal proceedings in the court of law, you may first arrange to send the notes to any of the Note Printing Presses, Forensic Science Laboratories, etc., in terms of the provisions of Section 292(1) and 292(3) of the Code of Criminal Procedure for examination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to first arrange to send the notes to any of the note printing presses, forensic science laboratories, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be produced in the court as evidence under section 292 of the criminal procedure code
controls.control_description: The expert opinion furnished may be produced in the court as evidence under Section 292 of the Criminal Procedure Code.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be produced in the court as evidence under section 292 of the criminal procedure code

controls.control_objective: To ensure please be returned to us after the completion of the investigation and/or proceedings in the court of law along with the detailed report of the invest
controls.control_description: The forged notes may please be returned to us after the completion of the investigation and/or proceedings in the court of law along with the detailed report of the investigation / decision of the court.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to please be returned to us after the completion of the investigation and/or proceedings in the court of law along with the detailed report of the invest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transmitted by e-mail to dcmfnvd@rbi
controls.control_description: NB: The completed format, in MS-Excel, shall be transmitted by e-mail to dcmfnvd@rbi.org.in and to the concerned Issue Office of RBI under whose jurisdiction the FNV Cell is functional, by 15th April every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transmitted by e-mail to dcmfnvd@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished
controls.control_description: The dates of such correspondence made by FNV Cell with police authorities may be furnished.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished

controls.control_objective: To ensure shift from green to blue when viewed from different angles
controls.control_description: Colour of the thread shall shift from green to blue when viewed from different angles.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to shift from green to blue when viewed from different angles
